headline: Truist Lowers GPC Target to $124, Notes Margin Recovery
summary: Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 22, Scot Ciccarelli at Truist Financial lowered the price recommendation on Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) to $124 from $127. It reiterated a Hold rating on the shares, following its Q1 earnings beat. The firm said Q1 […]
